requirement_topic.en: Energy Conservation Standards — DOE Minimum Efficiency (10 CFR 430)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标准——DOE最低能效要求（10 CFR 430）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標準——DOE最低能效要求（10 CFR 430）

summary.en: The US Department of Energy (DOE) mandates minimum energy conservation standards for residential refrigerators, refrigerator-freezers, and freezers under 10 CFR Part 430 Subpart B, Appendix A (test procedures) and the corresponding energy conservation standards table. All covered products manufactured for sale in the US (or imported for sale) must meet the applicable maximum annual energy consumption (kWh/year) limit for their product class, determined by adjusted volume (AV). Current standards for most product classes were updated effective September 15, 2014; DOE finalised further updates in 2023 (effective 2027 for some classes). Manufacturers (or importers acting as manufacturers) must submit a certification report to DOE's Compliance Certification Management System (CCMS) before first shipment to market. DOE enforcement includes factory inspection, market surveillance, and civil penalties up to $503 per unit per day of violation.
summary.zh: 美国能源部（DOE）依据10 CFR第430部分B子部分、附录A（测试程序）及相应能效标准表，对家用电冰箱、冰箱-冷冻箱及冷冻箱规定了最低能效标准。所有在美国制造或进口销售的相关产品，须符合按调整容积（AV）确定的对应产品类别最高年能耗（千瓦时/年）限值。大多数产品类别的现行标准自2014年9月15日起生效；DOE于2023年最终确定了进一步更新（部分类别自2027年起生效）。制造商（或作为制造商的进口商）须在首次向市场发货前，向DOE合规认证管理系统（CCMS）提交认证报告。DOE执法包括工厂检查、市场监督，违规可处每单位每天最高503美元的民事罚款。
summary.zht: 美國能源部（DOE）依據10 CFR第430部分B子部分、附錄A（測試程序）及相應能效標準表，對家用電冰箱、冰箱-冷凍箱及冷凍箱規定了最低能效標準。所有在美國製造或進口銷售的相關產品，須符合按調整容積（AV）確定的對應產品類別最高年能耗（千瓦時/年）限值。大多數產品類別的現行標準自2014年9月15日起生效；DOE於2023年最終確定了進一步更新（部分類別自2027年起生效）。製造商（或作為製造商的進口商）須在首次向市場發貨前，向DOE合規認證管理系統（CCMS）提交認證報告。DOE執法包括工廠檢查、市場監督，違規可處每單位每天最高503美元的民事罰款。

standards_or_laws: 10 CFR Part 430 — Energy Conservation Program for Consumer Products (DOE)
10 CFR Part 430 Subpart B Appendix A — Uniform Test Method for Measuring the Energy Consumption of Refrigerators, Refrigerator-Freezers, and Miscellaneous Refrigerators
42 U.S.C. § 6295 — Energy Policy and Conservation Act (EPCA) — statutory basis for DOE standards

summary.en: China mandates minimum energy efficiency under GB 12021.2 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), enforced via the CCC scheme and the China Energy Label (CEL) system administered by SAMR and the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC). GB 12021.2 uses an Energy Efficiency Index (EEI) based on adjusted volume and climate class. The test method is GB/T 8059 (series). Chinese GB 12021.2 compliance documentation is not accepted by DOE in place of a CCMS certification report based on 10 CFR 430 test procedures.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 12021.2（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）强制规定最低能效，通过CCC体系及由市场监管总局和国家发展和改革委员会管理的中国能源标识（CEL）制度加以执行。GB 12021.2采用基于调整容积和气候类别的能效指数（EEI）。测试方法为GB/T 8059（系列）。中国GB 12021.2合规文件，不能替代基于10 CFR 430测试程序的DOE CCMS认证报告。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 12021.2（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）強制規定最低能效，通過CCC體系及由市場監管總局和國家發展和改革委員會管理的中國能源標識（CEL）制度加以執行。GB 12021.2採用基於調整容積和氣候類別的能效指數（EEI）。測試方法為GB/T 8059（系列）。中國GB 12021.2合規文件，不能替代基於10 CFR 430測試程序的DOE CCMS認證報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (SAMR / NDRC)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods

gap.en: DOE energy test procedures under 10 CFR 430 Appendix A differ from GB/T 8059 in test conditions, volume calculation methodology, and energy calculation formula. Products cannot simply carry over Chinese energy test data. An accredited laboratory must re-test to 10 CFR 430 procedures, and the importer (acting as manufacturer) must file a CCMS certification report with DOE before first US sale. Failure to file is a strict-liability violation regardless of whether the product actually meets the energy limits. Note: DOE standards apply to the product class determined by US-market adjusted volume (cubic feet), not Chinese volume classifications.
gap.zh: 10 CFR 430附录A规定的DOE能效测试程序，在测试条件、容积计算方法及能耗计算公式上与GB/T 8059存在差异，产品不能直接沿用中国能效测试数据。须由认可实验室重新按照10 CFR 430程序进行测试，进口商（作为制造商）须在首次美国销售前向DOE提交CCMS认证报告。无论产品是否实际符合能效限值，未提交认证均构成严格责任违规。注：DOE标准适用于根据美国市场调整容积（立方英尺）确定的产品类别，而非中国容积分类。
gap.zht: 10 CFR 430附錄A規定的DOE能效測試程序，在測試條件、容積計算方法及能耗計算公式上與GB/T 8059存在差異，產品不能直接沿用中國能效測試數據。須由認可實驗室重新按照10 CFR 430程序進行測試，進口商（作為製造商）須在首次美國銷售前向DOE提交CCMS認證報告。無論產品是否實際符合能效限值，未提交認證均構成嚴格責任違規。注：DOE標準適用於根據美國市場調整容積（立方英尺）確定的產品類別，而非中國容積分類。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DOE CCMS certification filing required before first sale; civil penalties for non-compliance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 minimum energy efficiency compliance required for domestic Chinese market under CCC / CEL

source.publisher: US Government Publishing Office — eCFR (Code of Federal Regulations)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DOE minimum energy standards (10 CFR 430) are mandatory for US sale. CCMS certification filing by the importer/manufacturer is required before first shipment. Chinese GB 12021.2 test data and CEL labels are not accepted substitutes. Re-testing to 10 CFR 430 procedures by an accredited US laboratory is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】DOE最低能效标准（10 CFR 430）是美国销售的强制要求。进口商/制造商须在首次发货前提交CCMS认证报告。中国GB 12021.2测试数据和中国能源标识不被接受作为替代。须由美国认可实验室重新按照10 CFR 430程序进行测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】DOE最低能效標準（10 CFR 430）是美國銷售的強制要求。進口商/製造商須在首次發貨前提交CCMS認證報告。中國GB 12021.2測試數據和中國能源標識不被接受作為替代。須由美國認可實驗室重新按照10 CFR 430程序進行測試。

requirement_topic.en: FTC EnergyGuide Label (16 CFR 305) — Mandatory Disclosure
requirement_topic.zh: FTC能源指南标签（16 CFR 305）——强制披露
requirement_topic.zht: FTC能源指南標籤（16 CFR 305）——強制披露

summary.en: The US Federal Trade Commission (FTC) requires an EnergyGuide label on all covered household refrigerators and freezers sold at retail under 16 CFR Part 305 (Appliance Labeling Rule). The label must display: estimated annual energy cost (in USD, based on current national average electricity rate published by DOE), annual kWh consumption, the product's energy consumption relative to similar models (comparative scale), and the model's capacity in cubic feet. Labels must meet specific format, size, colour, and placement requirements. The EnergyGuide label data must be consistent with the DOE CCMS certification filing. Failure to affix a compliant EnergyGuide label is a separate FTC violation from any DOE energy standard non-compliance.
summary.zh: 美国联邦贸易委员会（FTC）依据16 CFR第305部分（家电标签规则）要求，所有在零售渠道销售的相关家用电冰箱及冷冻箱须粘贴能源指南（EnergyGuide）标签。标签须显示：年估算能源费用（美元，基于DOE发布的当前全国平均电价）、年千瓦时能耗、产品相对于同类机型的能耗对比（比较刻度盘）以及机型容积（立方英尺）。标签须满足特定的格式、尺寸、颜色和位置要求。EnergyGuide标签数据须与DOE CCMS认证报告一致。未粘贴合规EnergyGuide标签，属于独立于DOE能效标准违规之外的FTC违规行为。
summary.zht: 美國聯邦貿易委員會（FTC）依據16 CFR第305部分（家電標籤規則）要求，所有在零售渠道銷售的相關家用電冰箱及冷凍箱須貼附能源指南（EnergyGuide）標籤。標籤須顯示：年估算能源費用（美元，基於DOE發布的當前全國平均電價）、年千瓦時能耗、產品相對於同類機型的能耗對比（比較刻度盤）以及機型容積（立方英尺）。標籤須滿足特定的格式、尺寸、顏色和位置要求。EnergyGuide標籤數據須與DOE CCMS認證報告一致。未貼附合規EnergyGuide標籤，屬於獨立於DOE能效標準違規之外的FTC違規行為。

standards_or_laws: 16 CFR Part 305 — Appliance Labeling Rule (FTC EnergyGuide)
42 U.S.C. § 6294 — Energy Policy and Conservation Act — labeling requirements

summary.en: China requires the China Energy Label (CEL) under the NDRC / SAMR energy labelling programme, displaying energy efficiency grade (1–5 scale) and annual energy consumption (kWh/year) per GB 12021.2. The CEL format, grading scale, and content differ entirely from the US FTC EnergyGuide. Chinese CEL labels do not satisfy US FTC 16 CFR 305 requirements.
summary.zh: 中国依据国家发展和改革委员会/市场监管总局的能效标识计划，要求粘贴中国能效标识（CEL），显示能效等级（1—5级）及年能耗（千瓦时/年，依据GB 12021.2）。CEL的格式、评级体系和内容与美国FTC能源指南完全不同，中国CEL标签不满足美国FTC 16 CFR 305的要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據國家發展和改革委員會/市場監管總局的能效標識計劃，要求貼附中國能效標識（CEL），顯示能效等級（1—5級）及年能耗（千瓦時/年，依據GB 12021.2）。CEL的格式、評級體系和內容與美國FTC能源指南完全不同，中國CEL標籤不滿足美國FTC 16 CFR 305的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (basis for CEL label content)

gap.en: Exporters must design and affix a US-format FTC EnergyGuide label using the DOE-certified annual energy consumption figure (from the CCMS filing), calculated in kWh/year per 10 CFR 430 procedures, and converted to USD energy cost at the current FTC-published electricity rate. The label layout, yellow colour, and comparative scale must comply with 16 CFR 305. This is an additional labelling obligation beyond the DOE certification filing — both are independently required.
gap.zh: 出口商须依据CCMS申报中的DOE认证年能耗数据（按10 CFR 430程序计算，单位为千瓦时/年），并按FTC公布的当前电价换算为美元能源费用，设计并粘贴符合美国格式的FTC能源指南标签。标签版式、黄色底色及比较刻度盘须符合16 CFR 305规定。这是DOE认证申报之外的额外标签义务，两者须独立满足。
gap.zht: 出口商須依據CCMS申報中的DOE認證年能耗數據（按10 CFR 430程序計算，單位為千瓦時/年），並按FTC公布的當前電價換算為美元能源費用，設計並貼附符合美國格式的FTC能源指南標籤。標籤版式、黃色底色及比較刻度盤須符合16 CFR 305規定。這是DOE認證申報之外的額外標籤義務，兩者須獨立滿足。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — FTC EnergyGuide label required on all covered refrigerators/freezers at point of retail sale under 16 CFR 305
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) required under NDRC/SAMR programme for domestic Chinese market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] FTC EnergyGuide labelling (16 CFR 305) is mandatory for US retail sale of refrigerators. Chinese CEL labels are not accepted. The label must be designed using DOE CCMS-certified energy data and comply with the specific format in 16 CFR 305. Both the DOE certification filing and the FTC label are independently required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】FTC能源指南标签（16 CFR 305）是电冰箱在美国零售销售的强制要求。中国能效标识（CEL）不被接受。标签须使用DOE CCMS认证的能耗数据设计，并符合16 CFR 305规定的特定格式。DOE认证申报和FTC标签须独立满足。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】FTC能源指南標籤（16 CFR 305）是電冰箱在美國零售銷售的強制要求。中國能效標識（CEL）不被接受。標籤須使用DOE CCMS認證的能耗數據設計，並符合16 CFR 305規定的特定格式。DOE認證申報和FTC標籤須獨立滿足。

requirement_topic.zh: ENERGY STAR自愿认证计划——电冰箱
requirement_topic.zht: ENERGY STAR自願認證計劃——電冰箱

summary.en: ENERGY STAR is a voluntary US EPA / DOE joint programme that certifies products exceeding the DOE minimum energy standards by a specified margin. For refrigerators, ENERGY STAR Version 6.0 (current as of 2026) requires products to be at least 9–10% more efficient than the applicable DOE standard (margin varies by product class). ENERGY STAR certification requires testing by an EPA-recognised laboratory, third-party certification by an EPA-approved Certification Body (CB), and ongoing market surveillance. ENERGY STAR is not legally required but is commercially expected by major US retailers (e.g., Home Depot, Best Buy, Costco) and qualifies products for US state and utility rebate programmes. Products without ENERGY STAR face significant retail distribution disadvantages.
summary.zh: ENERGY STAR是美国EPA/DOE联合推行的自愿性认证计划，认证在DOE最低能效标准基础上进一步超标的产品（超标幅度有规定）。就电冰箱而言，ENERGY STAR第6.0版（截至2026年的现行版本）要求产品比适用DOE标准高效至少9—10%（具体幅度因产品类别而异）。ENERGY STAR认证要求由EPA认可的实验室进行测试，并由EPA批准的认证机构（CB）进行第三方认证，同时接受持续的市场监督。ENERGY STAR虽无法律强制，但受美国主要零售商（如Home Depot、Best Buy、Costco）商业上的普遍要求，且符合条件的产品可申请美国各州及公用事业补贴计划。未获ENERGY STAR认证的产品在零售分销方面将面临显著劣势。
summary.zht: ENERGY STAR是美國EPA/DOE聯合推行的自願性認證計劃，認證在DOE最低能效標準基礎上進一步超標的產品（超標幅度有規定）。就電冰箱而言，ENERGY STAR第6.0版（截至2026年的現行版本）要求產品比適用DOE標準高效至少9—10%（具體幅度因產品類別而異）。ENERGY STAR認證要求由EPA認可的實驗室進行測試，並由EPA批准的認證機構（CB）進行第三方認證，同時接受持續的市場監督。ENERGY STAR雖無法律強制，但受美國主要零售商（如Home Depot、Best Buy、Costco）商業上的普遍要求，且符合條件的產品可申請美國各州及公用事業補貼計劃。未獲ENERGY STAR認證的產品在零售分配方面將面臨顯著劣勢。

standards_or_laws: ENERGY STAR Program Requirements for Residential Refrigerators and Freezers Version 6.0 (EPA)
42 U.S.C. § 6294a — Energy Star programme statutory basis

summary.en: China has no direct equivalent to ENERGY STAR. The closest voluntary scheme is the China Energy Label Grade 1 designation (highest tier under GB 12021.2), which indicates the product is among the most efficient in China. However, the test methodology, energy thresholds, and certification pathway are entirely different. Chinese Grade 1 status does not qualify for or substitute ENERGY STAR certification.
summary.zh: 中国没有与ENERGY STAR直接对应的认证。最接近的自愿性方案是中国能效标识一级标识（GB 12021.2最高等级），代表产品在国内属于最高效之列。然而，测试方法、能效门槛及认证路径完全不同，中国一级能效标识不等同于ENERGY STAR认证，也不满足其要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與ENERGY STAR直接對應的認證。最接近的自願性方案是中國能效標識一級標識（GB 12021.2最高等級），代表產品在國內屬於最高效之列。然而，測試方法、能效門檻及認證路徑完全不同，中國一級能效標識不等同於ENERGY STAR認證，也不滿足其要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Energy efficiency grade 1 (highest, voluntary target in China)

gap.en: ENERGY STAR is voluntary but commercially critical for US retail channels. Exporters wishing to carry the ENERGY STAR mark must partner with an EPA-approved Certification Body, test to 10 CFR 430 procedures at an EPA-recognised lab, and submit an application to the ENERGY STAR programme. ENERGY STAR adds a third-party audit layer on top of the mandatory DOE CCMS filing. Chinese energy label data cannot be used; independent US testing is required.
gap.zh: ENERGY STAR属自愿性认证，但对美国零售渠道具有重要商业价值。希望使用ENERGY STAR标志的出口商须与EPA批准的认证机构合作，在EPA认可的实验室按10 CFR 430程序进行测试，并向ENERGY STAR计划提交申请。ENERGY STAR在强制性DOE CCMS申报之上增加了第三方审计层。不能使用中国能效标签数据，须进行独立的美国测试。
gap.zht: ENERGY STAR屬自願性認證，但對美國零售渠道具有重要商業價值。希望使用ENERGY STAR標誌的出口商須與EPA批准的認證機構合作，在EPA認可的實驗室按10 CFR 430程序進行測試，並向ENERGY STAR計劃提交申請。ENERGY STAR在強制性DOE CCMS申報之上增加了第三方審計層。不能使用中國能效標籤數據，須進行獨立的美國測試。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary (federal law) — but commercially expected by major US retailers; required for state/utility rebate eligibility
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent; China Energy Label Grade 1 is the highest voluntary efficiency designation under GB 12021.2

source.publisher: US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) — ENERGY STAR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ENERGY STAR certification is voluntary under US federal law but commercially critical for mainstream US retail. It requires independent testing and a separate EPA-approved Certification Body engagement. Chinese energy label data is not accepted. Exporters targeting major US retail channels should plan for ENERGY STAR certification in addition to mandatory DOE CCMS filing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】ENERGY STAR认证在美国联邦法律下属自愿性质，但对于进入主流美国零售市场具有重要商业价值。须进行独立测试并委托EPA批准的认证机构。中国能效标签数据不被接受。以美国主要零售渠道为目标的出口商，除强制性DOE CCMS申报外，还应规划ENERGY STAR认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】ENERGY STAR認證在美國聯邦法律下屬自願性質，但對於進入主流美國零售市場具有重要商業價值。須進行獨立測試並委託EPA批准的認證機構。中國能效標籤數據不被接受。以美國主要零售渠道為目標的出口商，除強制性DOE CCMS申報外，還應規劃ENERGY STAR認證。
